heroHeading:
Hi, I'm the Baker —
and I've been at this since I could reach the counter.
storyP1: It started the way most good things do — with a craving and a cast-iron skillet. Growing up in East Texas, I learned early that the best food comes from patient hands and honest ingredients. My grandmother's kitchen smelled like butter and brown sugar year-round, and somewhere between her pecan pie and my first sourdough starter, I knew this was what I was meant to do.
storyP2: Stillwater Bakery is my love letter to that tradition. Every loaf is slow-fermented. Every pie crust is hand-rolled. I source as much as I can from local farms and producers, because food just tastes better when you know where it came from.
storyP3: As a licensed Texas cottage baker, I bake in small batches from my home kitchen — which means everything you get is made with the same care I'd put into baking for my own family. Because honestly, that's exactly what you are.

values.title: Made to Order
values.description: Nothing sits on a shelf. Every item is baked fresh when you order it.

values.title: Local Ingredients
values.description: Sourced from East Texas farms and producers whenever possible.

values.title: Small Batches
values.description: Quality over quantity, always. Every item gets my full attention.
